title: Incident Recovery Communication Packet Briefing
summary: Support, status-page, and customer-success notes about communicating recovery after failed installs. Briefing focus: Recommend how Briefing Genie should summarize recovery work after a setup incident.

claims.text: Support incident recap: A failed installer release caused 31 setup tickets in two days.
Status page draft: The draft status update says the issue is resolved, but engineering has only verified recovery on macOS and Linux.
Customer success guidance: Customer success wants a concise message that separates who is affected, what action they should take, and which environments are still pending validation.

openQuestions: Confirm whether engineering fix note has newer follow-up data.
Confirm whether docs update checklist has newer follow-up data.
recommendation: Use this as a fast first pass, then inspect source tension and citation support in the lab before treating the recommendation as shippable.
